name: axis_srl_fifo
description: Small AXI-stream FIFO intended for LUT/SRL-style short-depth buffering with ready/valid handshakes.

source_refs.notes: SRL-based AXI-stream FIFO; this skill keeps a compact shift-register teaching subset.

states.name: EMPTY
states.description: The shift register holds no valid words.

states.name: OCCUPIED
states.description: One or more short-depth stream words are buffered.

constraints: Use for small same-clock AXI-stream buffers where LUT/SRL implementation is desired.
Do not use for large deep queues; choose axis_fifo.
Do not use for timing-only register pipelines; choose axis_pipeline_fifo.
Preserve FIFO order even though the implementation shifts data.
patterns: Store stream data in a packed shift-register array.
Shift entries toward the output on each accepted output transfer.
Append new input data at the current occupancy index.
Track occupancy with a small count register.
implementation_notes: Favor this skill when the query mentions SRL, shift register, LUTRAM, shallow FIFO, or small depth.
Keep DEPTH modest; synthesis can infer SRL resources for FPGA targets.
Backpressure must hold the oldest output word stable.
For frame sidebands, shift all sideband fields with tdata.
test_strategy: Fill the small FIFO while output is stalled.
Exercise alternating input/output to catch shift count errors.
verification_goals: Short-depth buffering preserves stream word order.
Input ready drops when the shift register is full.
Output data is stable under backpressure.
Shift and append operations maintain the correct occupancy.
